mapper.select: SELECT d.*, u.USER_NAME AS LAST_CHG_NAME, o.ORG_NAME, p.DPT_NAME AS UP_DPT_NAME FROM admin_sm_dpt d LEFT JOIN admin_sm_user u ON u.USER_ID = d.LAST_CHG_USR LEFT JOIN admin_sm_org o ON o.ORG_ID = d.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN admin_sm_dpt p ON d.UP_DPT_ID = p.DPT_ID ${ew.customSqlSegment}
select T1.dpt_code as dptId, T1.dpt_name as dptName from admin_sm_dpt T1 ${ew.customSqlSegment}
SELECT DATA_TENANT_ID as tenantid ,COUNT(DATA_TENANT_ID) as tenantcount FROM admin_sm_dpt GROUP BY DATA_TENANT_ID

SELECT T0.DPT_ID,T0.DPT_CODE,T0.DPT_NAME,T0.ORG_ID,T0.UP_DPT_ID,T0.DPT_STS,T0.LAST_CHG_USR,T0.LAST_CHG_DT,T1.ORG_NAME FROM admin_sm_dpt T0 LEFT JOIN admin_sm_org T1 ON T0.ORG_ID=T1.ORG_ID ${ew.customSqlSegment}
